item.description:
Better Voice 0.6.0

  • First-launch onboarding — a guided welcome screen for permissions, your dictation hotkey, the meeting save folder, the model server, and personal context.
  • In-app updates — checks on launch and every 14 days, shows what changed, and installs with “Restart to update”.
  • Model server setup in onboarding — pick your Ollama endpoint + model, test the connection, with a help page explaining Ollama.
  • Lighter meeting permission — system audio now uses Core Audio taps, so it needs only “System Audio Recording”, not full Screen Recording.
  • Meetings capture microphone + system audio by default, with a new picker in Settings → Meetings.
  • Bigger, resizable speaker-naming window.
